rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Defendants Joint Motion For Judgment Of Dismissal (C.C.P. 581(F) (3))
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2021 line 3. DEFENDANT LA COSTA LOANS, INC., RICHARD SHRIGLEY, SS DREAMBUILDERS, LLC, SHRIGLEY HOLDINGS, INC., SF SAN BRUNO, LLC, LA COSTA LOANS HOLDINGS, LLC, AND CHONG HAN'S Notice Of Motion And Joint Motion For Judgment Of Dismissal (C.C.P. 581(F) (3)). Hearing Required. By no later than 8:00 a.m. on February 2, 2021 Plaintiff's counsel to file a declaration addressing (1) failure to file 5th Amended Complaint as instructed in the Court's order sustaining the demurrer to the 4th Amended Complaint, i.e. explain why Court's express instructions were disregarded; (2) failure to seek Court's leave to file a compliant 5th AC after the issue was brought to Plaintiff's attention and before the ex-parte hearing; (3) failure to oppose the ex-parte application and seek leave to fix the non-compliance. See Vaccaro v. Kaiman (1998) 63 Cal.App.4th 761 "At the commencement of the October 21, 1996, hearing on the motions the court announced, "Case dismissed." Rucker asked, "may we have leave to file a signed pleading,""; and (4) failure to seek Court's leave to re-file previously stricken 5th Amended Complaint before belated December 28, 2020 submission. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LAURA SACHS VS. AYNUR GUNDOGDU ET AL

rulings.Case Title: MIDTOWN PARK APARTMENTS - KALCO PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ANTENEH HAILU
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant Anteneh Hailu'S Motion Vacate Judgment And Dismiss Action With Prejudice Pursuant To Ccp Sec 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2021 line 5. DEFENDANT ANTENEH HAILU's Notice Of Motion Vacate Judgment And Dismiss Action With Prejudice Pursuant To CCP Sec. 664.6 is GRANTED as follows: The judgement in this action is set aside and the action shall be re-restricted. Plaintiff shall dismiss this action within 5 days of notice of entry of this order. Moving party to prepare order. =(501/CFH)
